Author: John Savill's Technical Training
Description:
Pretty quick update this week but some amaze amaze amaze items!

🔎 Looking for content on a particular topic? Search the channel. If I have something it will be there! 🤔 Due to the channel growth and number of people wanting help I no longer can answer or even read questions and they will just stay in the moderation queue never to be seen so please post questions to other sites like Reddit, Microsoft Community Hub etc.

▬▬▬▬▬▬ C H A P T E R S ⏰ ▬▬▬▬▬▬ 00:00 - Introduction 00:10 - New videos 02:05 - Azure Red Hat OpenShift new regions 02:32 - VM and VMSS full ephemeral OS disk caching 04:13 - App Config AFD integration 05:34 - Premium SSDv2 new region 06:16 - User delegation SAS for table file and queue 07:00 - Azure Data Box to Files Provisioned v2 07:49 - ANF cool access enhancements 08:26 - Cosmos DB for PostgreSQL retirement 09:11 - Event Grid updates 10:48 - Copilot Cowork 11:39 - Azure Speech Neural HD 2.5 12:18 - Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B model 13:37 - Close
